name: Zombie
description: A bold tiki-style Zombie cocktail made with light and dark BACARDÍ rum, citrus, triple sec, and grenadine. The infamous drink that instigated the tiki cocktail movement. Known for its blend of exotic rums, Zombie thrills with its bold, rich flavour. It’s ideal for all year round.
recipe_steps: Pour all ingredients into a shaker full of ice, and give it a good shake.
Strain and pour into a highball glass filled with crushed ice.
Give it a stir with a bar spoon.
Garnish with a cherry and orange slice.
searchable_text: Zombie main rum BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum A bold tiki-style Zombie cocktail made with light and dark BACARDÍ rum, citrus, triple sec, and grenadine. The infamous drink that instigated the tiki cocktail movement. Known for its blend of exotic rums, Zombie thrills with its bold, rich flavour. It’s ideal for all year round. ingredients 30 ml BACARDÍ Carta Blanca rum, 20 ml BACARDÍ Carta Negra rum, 15 ml triple sec, 30 ml orange juice, 15 ml lime juice, 15 ml simple syrup, 5 ml grenadine recipe steps Pour all ingredients into a shaker full of ice, and give it a good shake. Strain and pour into a highball glass filled with crushed ice. Give it a stir with a bar spoon. Garnish with a cherry and orange slice.
